concept.headline: Crystal collections pair strong typing with powerful Enumerable tools.
concept.explanation: Arrays and hashes are common data containers. Methods like map, select, and reduce transform and summarize data clearly.
keyPoints: Compile-time type checks on element types

demo.intro: Filter and transform an array step by step.

explanation.misconception: Array elements share one compile-time type

explanation.why: select keeps elements where predicate true

prediction.explanation: select keeps only values greater than 4, so result is [5, 6].

explanation.afterDemo: Collection pipelines are cleaner than manual loops for many tasks and communicate intent directly.
keyTakeaways: Prefer clear pipelines for maintainable code.

practice.prompt: From [3,4,5,6], keep numbers >= 5, multiply by 3, print result.

feedback.successMessage: Great pipeline. Filtering and mapping are correct.

summary.title: Collections — Complete
takeaways: Collections become powerful with Enumerable methods.
select and map are core transform tools.
